_doc: FROZEN shared spec for RetinAI agent policies. Categories are protocol-curated allowlists of vetted addresses; templates compose categories + caps so a user configures an agent in one tap instead of whitelisting addresses by hand. The policy is enforced on-chain by the AgentVault cage — the agent can NEVER change it. Amounts are in USDC (6 decimals on-chain).

templates.name: Dollar-cost averaging
templates.summary: Buys a fixed amount on blue-chip DEXes, capped per day.

templates.name: Yield optimizer
templates.summary: Moves stablecoins between audited lending markets to chase the best rate, 24/7.

templates.name: Recurring payments
templates.summary: Pays your saved recipients on schedule — payroll, subscriptions, invoices.

templates.name: Trading strategy
templates.summary: Executes a strategy on blue-chip DEXes within a strict daily budget.

templates.name: Agent services (x402)
templates.summary: Pays for APIs, inference and data per call — thousands of micro-payments no human could approve.
